creator: knu@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

You should have seen pkg-message which tells you how to configure 
Apache to enable it. 

As a port is required to be able to install and uninstall software 
symmetrically, the mod_ruby port does not modify httpd.conf directly 
so that it can uninstall itself cleanly afterwards. 

Also, the way to configure mod_ruby may vary per user, I, as the 
maintainer, would like to leave it to him/her with showing some 
instruction. 

Thanks for reporting, and I'd appreciate receiving a further request 
if any.
